narrative: Hawkish Fed dot plot under Chair Warsh drives broad dollar strength as median 2026 projections rise to 3.8% — DXY firms +0.83%; USD/JPY at 160.59 tests intervention levels with a 275bp OIS carry advantage; gold higher +0.02%; equities -1.21%; VIX 18.4.
